rationale: Gov't Code §2001.039 governs the four-year review cycle for agency rules. A statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict with this review schedule; agencies may amend rules independently of the cycle.
quote: A state agency shall review a rule not later than the fourth anniversary of the date on which the rule takes effect and every four years after that date.
_note: No conflict. §2001.039 establishes a periodic review cadence and does not restrict extracyclic rule amendments necessitated by statutory changes.
